top_findings.title: Comprehensive test coverage of 62 tests
top_findings.evidence: pytest output: 62 passed in 0.76s (100% pass rate)
top_findings.suggestion: Test suite validates all five capability areas and 25+ sample questions

top_findings.title: Robust data reconciliation across multiple sources
top_findings.evidence: data_loader.py: deduplicate_matches function handles cross-file duplication by (competition, season)
top_findings.suggestion: This ensures consistent standings calculations and prevents team name mismatches
